title: The Throne Room
description: Fires on entering the throne room, BEFORE world1_mordaine_intro. Three-line stakes-setter. The reveal is the SECOND thing: the plain chair, not the overturned throne, is where the power actually sits. She was ready before the doors opened. Voice: Theron-adjacent narrator, tired-elder register. Does not spoil the Calibrant reveal — she is just the usurper here. cowir-overworld wires the trigger on the threshold tile before the cutscene_flag_world1_mordaine_intro_seen guard fires world1_mordaine_intro.

steps.text: The doors open onto a room that has forgotten which end is the top.
The throne is overturned. The seat *beside* it is not — a plain chair, of someone who never needed the raised one. Whoever sat here has been quietly ruling from a chair no one bows to.
She is already looking at you. She was already looking at you before the doors opened. You were expected.
